proof: function(x0: List[Nat], x1: Nat) { List.nil[Nat] != x0 or coprime_with_all(x1, x0) }(List.nil[Nat], a)

function(x0: Nat, x1: List[Nat], x2: List[Nat]) { List.cons(x0, x1) != x2 or not pairwise_coprime(x1) or not coprime_with_all(x0, x1) or pairwise_coprime(x2) }(a, List.nil[Nat], List.cons(a, List.nil[Nat]))
function(x0: Nat, x1: List[Nat], x2: List[Nat]) { List.cons(x0, x1) != x2 or not pairwise_coprime(x2) or coprime_with_all(x0, x1) }(head, tail, List.cons(head, tail))
function(x0: Nat, x1: List[Nat], x2: List[Nat]) { List.cons(x0, x1) != x2 or not pairwise_coprime(x2) or pairwise_coprime(x1) }(head, tail, List.cons(head, tail))
function(x0: Nat, x1: List[Nat]) { not pairwise_coprime(List.cons(x0, x1)) or pairwise_coprime(x1) }(head, tail)
function(x0: Nat, x1: List[Nat]) { not pairwise_coprime(List.cons(x0, x1)) or coprime_with_all(x0, x1) }(head, tail)
function(x0: Nat, x1: List[Nat], x2: List[Nat]) { List.cons(x0, x1) != x2 or not pairwise_coprime(x1) or not coprime_with_all(x0, x1) or pairwise_coprime(x2) }(head, tail, List.cons(head, tail))
